request_payload.exposure_text: As a mom, I worry about keeping my family safe. The recent attacks show we can't afford to be naive. Stronger domestic security powers aren't about taking liberties - they're about giving our agencies the tools they need to stop threats before they happen. We've seen what happens when we're unprepared. Let's not make that mistake again. #SafetyFirst #SecureOurFuture
